templates.name: Mutual NDA (Standard Terms)
templates.description: Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement standard terms governing the use and protection of confidential information exchanged between two parties. Used together with the matching cover page.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Fill-in-the-blanks cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Captures the parties, purpose, term, and governing law, and incorporates the Standard Terms by reference.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) covering access and use of a cloud/SaaS product, support, user accounts, customer content, fees, warranties, and liability.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-access design partnerships, covering product access, the program, feedback, fees, and intellectual property.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement (SLA) defining uptime targets, uptime calculation, response time targets, and related service credits for a cloud service.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA) governing SOW-based professional services, including cooperation, change orders, acceptance, subcontractors, and deliverables.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement (DPA) covering processor/subprocessor relationships, processing of personal data, security, and data protection law compliance.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement governing installation and use of software, user accounts, feedback and usage data, machine learning, and open source software.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement covering cooperation and obligations between partners, feedback, payment and taxes, and related terms.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for evaluating a product during a pilot period, covering pilot access, license, user accounts, customer content, and feedback.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) addressing HIPAA business associate obligations, permitted uses and disclosures of PHI, safeguards, and assessments.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper standard AI Addendum supplementing an agreement to cover use of AI services, restrictions, model training, non-training improvement, intellectual property, and privacy.
